h1.visual_description: Not visible on this page; typically reserved for chapter titles in a larger, bold, sans-serif font.

h2.visual_description: Bold, sans-serif font, numbered (e.g., 6.2.), left-aligned, serves as a section header.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Figure caption/title, bold sans-serif text located above charts.
Footnote text, smaller serif font at the bottom of the page, preceded by a horizontal separator line.
Page number, located in the bottom-left or bottom-right margin.

layout_info.primary_flow: two-column for body text; single-column/full-width for figures and section headings
layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: page numbers at bottom corners; horizontal rule above footnotes
